name: Potato Pancakes,latkes I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the 4 very large potatoes.
2. Drain off half of the liquid that comes out of the grated potatoes.
3. Add 1 egg, 1 tablespoon salt, 1 teaspoon black pepper, 1 tablespoon flour, 2 teaspoons grated onion, and 1/2 teaspoon baking powder to the grated potatoes.
4. Mix everything together very well.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into very hot oil (475°F) in a skillet.
6. Brown both sides on each pancake until crispy.
7. When ready to serve, reheat uncovered in an oven at 450°F until crispy.
8. Serve with apple sauce.
This method will yield approximately 100 pancakes that are 2 inches in diameter. If you use a larger spoon or cup, the resulting pancakes will be larger and require less cooking time, but they will still have the same delicious taste.
